description: Hyperlattice blast overlay projector. Reads composer-lite-graph.json and intent snapshots; does not build a parallel DAG.

actions.description: Project blast radius overlay onto composer graph

cca.summary: Projects coding-governance blast radius onto the existing Composer hyperlattice canvas.
use_when: visualizing intent impact on deployed topology
avoid_when: building a new graph from scratch
replacing validateLatticeScene or UI scene graphs
